introSection: Crazy Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Seoul Park in Kwachon-si, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Unlike most wild mouse roller coasters, this ride uses a tubular track system similar to that of Arrow Dynamics and Vekoma.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars use over-the-shoulder restraints and resemble a single car from an Arrow Dynamics looping roller coaster train. They feature mouse heads on the front.

fullText:
Crazy Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Seoul Park in Kwachon-si, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea.

Unlike most wild mouse roller coasters, this ride uses a tubular track system similar to that of Arrow Dynamics and Vekoma.

The cars use over-the-shoulder restraints and resemble a single car from an Arrow Dynamics looping roller coaster train. They feature mouse heads on the front.
